title: Crispy Turkish Spinach Stir-fry
description: A savory and crisp quick-fix dish featuring blue food coloring for a fun twist on traditional Turkish spinach dishes, made gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: Wash and chop the spinach leaves. Finely chop the onion and mince the garlic.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the finely chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for another minute or until fragrant.
Stir in salt and black pepper, then add spinach leaves. Cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix gluten-free flour with water until you have a smooth paste. Pour the mixture into the skillet, stirring continuously to coat the spinach evenly.
If using blue food coloring, add a few drops and stir well until fully incorporated and visible on top of the spinach.
Remove from heat and serve immediately, garnished with blue food coloring if desired.
